/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sage.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/codegen.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/compiler.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/constfold.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/dce.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/env.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/formatter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/gc.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/inline.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/interpreter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/linter.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/llvm_backend.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/lsp.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/module.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/net.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/pass.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/stdlib.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/typecheck.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/value.c.o CMakeFiles/sage.dir/src/heartbeat.c.o -o sage  -lm -lpthread -ldl -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto
